i.s: Manages personal finance transactions and budgets using event sourcing.
Write-side aggregate handling finance commands and emitting events.
Writes transactions import outcome events to the event store.
Sends notifications to the clients/users
Builds read models from the event store.
Fetches transactions from Enable Banking and calls CoreEventInjector with the outcome.
A new budget was created.
A budget was deleted.
Spending exceeded the budget limit.
Spending reached the budget's alert threshold.
A budget's settings were changed.
User requested a transaction import.
A transaction's category was set or changed.
Transaction import finished successfully.
Transaction import failed with an error.
A transaction's note was created or updated.
A new transaction was recorded.
Tags were applied to a transaction.
Assign or update a transaction's category.
Create a new spending budget.
Permanently remove a budget.
Initiate a transaction import from Enable Banking.
Record a new financial transaction.
Apply tags to a transaction.
Modify an existing budget.
Set or update a transaction's note.
Per-budget read model tracking spending progress.
Append-only event table for all Core domain events.
Aggregated financial summary for the dashboard.
Per-transaction read model for list and search.
Import transactions from Enable Banking — request to completion or failure.
